title: Dart Frog equips to its killer and deals end-turn damage

card.rawText: If this card is killed by a creature that is not holding a weapon, equip it to that creature as an Infinite equip magic card. The equipped creature receives 5 damage at the end of your turn.

effect.value: If this card is killed by a creature that is not holding a weapon, equip it to that creature as an Infinite equip magic card. The equipped creature receives 5 damage at the end of your turn.

plan.title: Dart Frog equips to its killer and deals end-turn damage
plan.summary: Kill Dart Frog with an unequipped creature and verify the equip-to-killer plus 5 end-turn damage route.

notes: Read text first: If this card is killed by a creature that is not holding a weapon, equip it to that creature as an Infinite equip magic card. The equipped creature receives 5 damage at the end of your turn.

steps: Attack and kill Dart Frog with a creature holding no weapon.
Verify Dart Frog becomes an equip on the killer.

expectedAssertions.label: Killer receives Dart Frog end-turn damage

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Kill Dart Frog with an unequipped creature and verify the equip-to-killer plus 5 end-turn damage route.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
